blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a visual timezone converter.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation that the system provides a visual timezone converter, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a visual timezone converter but lacks concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied. As a result, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
